notes: Major music + arena update. 10 new tracks across HUB/ARENA/CAPTURE/PAINT pools — each game mode pulls from its own track pool. Track-selection carousel spins before every match and reveals which track you'll play. Arena now reacts to key changes (palette shifts), energy zones (hazard density), and long breaks (calm-then-BURST transitions). Audio analyzer rewritten to detect tonal shifts and 4-bar energy windows. Removed chaos_apex / chill_halcyon_grid / chill_slow_bloom — replaced by the new track pool.
